hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Permission needed in '"$(basename "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR")"'" with title "🔐 Claude Code" subtitle "Session: '"${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:-unknown}"'"' && curl -H "Title: Permission Required" -H "Tags: lock,claude" -H "Priority: high" -d "Project: $(basename "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR")\nSession: ${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:-unknown}\nTask: ${CLAUDE_TASK_DESCRIPTION:-Awaiting permission}" ntfy.sh/alesito-de-las-eras

osascript -e 'display notification "Waiting for input in '"$(basename "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR")"'" with title "⏸️ Claude Code" subtitle "Session: '"${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:-unknown}"'"' && curl -H "Title: Claude Idle - Input Needed" -H "Tags: hourglass,claude" -H "Priority: default" -d "Project: $(basename "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR")\nSession: ${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:-unknown}\nStatus: Task complete, awaiting next instruction" ntfy.sh/alesito-de-las-eras
